reports.description: A downed tree was reported. The time was based on radar data.

Wind turbine has caught fire. Most probable cause is lightning strike. There was an active storm in this area at the time of fire report. Some observers have seen CG lightning in the area of wind turbine.
A downed tree was reported after a period of strong wind gusts.
references: "Legionowski: Powalone i uszkodzone drzewa. Pogoda niemiło zaskoczyła", Legio24, 06 APR 2026.
